title: List of 3D-enabled mobile phones
body: This is a list of 3D-enabled mobile phones, which typically use autostereoscopic displays. Some devices may use other kinds of display technology, like holographic displays or multiscopic displays. Some devices also employ eye tracking in aiming the 3D effect toward the viewer's eye.
categories: CS1 maint: archived copy as title
Short description is different from Wikidata
